scripts.test: npm run test:encoding && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:unit: node --no-warnings --experimental-specifier-resolution=node --test --experimental-strip-types tests/r1-core.test.mjs tests/flash.test.mjs tests/trial-lifecycle.test.mjs tests/release-lifecycle.test.mjs tests/horse-calendar-rules.test.mjs tests/relationship-state.test.mjs tests/operational-slots.test.mjs tests/booking-guards.test.mjs tests/message-summaries.test.mjs tests/operational-workspaces.test.mjs tests/occupancy-rpc-contract.test.mjs tests/server-actions-bookings.test.mjs tests/server-actions-relationships.test.mjs
